title: Universal CPG Export (v2)
description: Validates the full JSON document produced by GraphCollector.export_cpg_v1().

analysis_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the analysis was performed.

graph_id.description: Stable identifier for this graph export. Set to the project_id by default.

generator.description: Name of the tool that produced this export (e.g. 'GraphCreator').

generator_version.description: Semantic version of the generator tool.

overlays.description: Optional list of CPG overlay names applied on top of the base graph.

nodes.description: All CPG nodes (AST nodes + knowledge graph nodes) after cross-file merge.

edges.description: All CPG edges (AST edges + knowledge graph edges) after cross-file merge.
